overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets, industrial architecture, and pedestrians with umbrellas. The footage appears to be from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), showcasing an atmospheric urban environment with holographic billboards and futuristic city design.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a rain-slicked industrial courtyard at night, dominated by massive ventilation fans on the building facade. The camera moves forward past red and white concrete barriers, passing a seated figure on a bench, heading toward a distant staircase.

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a wide concrete staircase following a pedestrian with a glowing umbrella. Vehicle headlights pass by on the right as the climb continues, transitioning from the open industrial area to a covered elevated walkway at the top.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered elevated walkway illuminated by cyan neon lights, the camera passes under overhead lighting fixtures. A circular neon sign glows on the left wall as the path approaches a modern curved glass building.

segments.scene_description: Turning the corner around the curved glass building reveals a wider street scene with large digital billboards. The camera briefly tilts up to admire the reflective glass facade before continuing along the busier sidewalk where pedestrians carry glowing umbrellas.

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a densely populated commercial area with bright purple vending machines lining the left side. The sidewalk is crowded with pedestrians carrying illuminated umbrellas, and a red traffic light becomes visible ahead as the camera approaches an intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate industrial courtyard into a vibrant, neon-drenched commercial district. It begins by moving past massive ventilation fans and concrete barriers in a rain-slicked courtyard, heading toward a distant staircase. As the camera ascends the stairs behind a pedestrian with a glowing umbrella, the open industrial space transitions into a covered elevated walkway illuminated by cyan neon lights and circular signs. The scene then opens up as the camera rounds a curved glass building, shifting from the enclosed walkway to a wider street filled with towering digital billboards and reflective facades. Finally, the path leads into a densely populated commercial area lined with purple vending machines and crowds of illuminated umbrellas before approaching a red traffic light at a busy intersection.
